name: Climate → Control
description: This is an [Action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) for setting parameters for climate devices.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the climate device to control.

config_entries.label: Custom Fan Mode
config_entries.description: Set one of the supported custom_fan_modes of the climate device.

config_entries.label: Custom Preset
config_entries.description: Set one of the supported custom_presets of the climate device.

config_entries.label: Fan Mode
config_entries.description: Set the fan mode of the climate device. One of `ON`, `OFF`, `AUTO`, `LOW`, `MEDIUM`, `HIGH`, `MIDDLE`, `FOCUS`, `DIFFUSE`, `QUIET`.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Put the climate device in a specific mode. One of

options.label: The device is manually set to off, the device is inactive.
The device should heat/cool to maintain a target temperature.
The device is set to cool to reach a target temperature.
The device is set to heat to reach a target temperature.
The device is set to dry/humidity mode.
The device only has the fan enabled, no heating or cooling is taking place.
The device is should adjust the temperature dynamically. For example based on a schedule, or learned behavior.

config_entries.label: Preset
config_entries.description: Set the preset of the climate device. One of `ECO`, `AWAY`, `BOOST`, `COMFORT`, `HOME`, `SLEEP`, `ACTIVITY`.

config_entries.label: Swing Mode
config_entries.description: Set the swing mode of the climate device. One of `OFF`, `BOTH`, `VERTICAL`, `HORIZONTAL`.

config_entries.label: Target Humidity
config_entries.description: Set the target humidity of a climate device.

config_entries.label: Target Temperature
config_entries.description: Set the target temperature of a climate device.

config_entries.label: Target Temperature High
config_entries.description: Set the higher target temperature of a climate device with a two-point target temperature.

config_entries.label: Target Temperature Low
config_entries.description: Set the lower target temperature of a climate device with a two-point target temperature.
